text:

Author: emaste

Log:
  sftp: disallow creation (of empty files) in read-only mode

  Direct commit to stable/11; already fixed in newer OpenSSH in 12 and
  later.

  Reported by:	Dani
  Obtained from:	OpenBSD 1.111
  Security:	CVE-2017-15906
